output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?office ?officeLabel WHERE {
  ?office wdt:P17 wd:Q359 ; wdt:P31 wd:Q2554 ; rdfs:label ?officeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?officeLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?officeLabel) , 'election commissioner'))
}
